positive: A whimsical and stylish arrangement of celestial elements and natural flora: glowing crescent moons, scattered nebula dust, stylized constellations forming abstract patterns, intertwined with bioluminescent jungle vines and large, tropical monstera leaves. The composition should be symmetrical, centered, and highly detailed, featuring strong negative space and vibrant contrast. Use a deep indigo and emerald green color palette accented by gold foil glitter effects and pops of magenta glow. Flat graphic design style combined with ethereal watercolor realism, ideal for a wearable patch or t-shirt print. Vector art quality, high contrast, symmetrical, central composition, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed, crisp lines.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, messy, busy, muted, monochrome, photorealism
